Irrelevant of the size and sophistication of your business, it would benefit from a systematic approach to managing workplace safety. The question is seeking to confirm that there is an organisational structure where all individual’s in the business understand their responsibilities regarding workplace safety for both the business and for them as an individual, there should be documented policies and procedures that add value and make safe working integral within the business, these should include address risk associated with workplace tasks and activity related to your business services and include training and managing assurance within your business to not only keep you complaint with the law but also ensure your workforce and others who may be impacted by your business are safe from harm.
Can the company demonstrate that there is a formal safety management system (SMS) in place to manage all aspects of the transportation business including the carriage and loading of goods in place?

Check the relevant options, multiple options can be marked

The health and safety hazards relating to the work
Aspect / hazards and risks / impact associated with your work activities
The legal obligations associated with the assessed risks
The control measures that need to be implemented to minimise or remove the risks
